MINUTE ORDER RE: DIRECTING PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AN ORDER ON JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS FOR THE TAX YEARS 1985-1986 AND 1986-1987. PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO PROPERTY TAX REFUNDS FOR A TOTAL OF $231,256.47 FOR 1985-1986 AND A TOTAL OF $314,287.62 FOR 1986-1987. PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 9% PER ANNUM (SIMPLE INTEREST) FOR DATE OF PAYMENT AND TO POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 7% PER ANNUM. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-11-2002 IN DEPT. 206, FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT GRANTED.
